prompt: A minimalist fine-art poster portrait of a woman in clean side profile facing right, shown from about mid-torso up, with her face partially obscured by a soft rectangular blur over the front of the head. She has dark black hair styled in a low loose bun with gentle volume and wispy strands, and wears 1 dangling silver earring on the visible ear. Dress her in a structured black blazer or tailored coat with a deep neckline. The lower half of the figure dissolves into elongated dripping black ink trails, with many uneven vertical streaks extending downward like wet paint pulled by gravity, creating a dramatic melting silhouette. Place 1 large, perfectly round vivid red disc directly behind her head and upper shoulders, centered like a halo or rising sun. Use a strictly limited palette of black, red, and warm off-white. Set the background to a soft cream paper or canvas texture with subtle grain. Light the subject like a high-end noir editorial portrait with strong contrast, sculpted highlights on the ear, jaw, neck, and cheek contour, and deep shadow across the clothing. Keep the composition tall and centered with generous negative space, elegant poster-like balance, moody contemplative atmosphere, and crisp, refined photographic detail blended with painterly graphic design.
